title: 'Illegal, inhuman': Iran sticks Spanish PM's 'no war' message on missiles targeting Israel
summary_full: Iran has used Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's anti-war statements on missiles targeting Israel. Images show these messages in English and Persian on weaponry. Sanchez's condemnation of the conflict as illegal and inhuman has gained international attention. This action highlights Spain's opposition to the ongoing military operations. Iran continues its struggle with Israeli-American forces.
